allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object { $_DisplayName -like ''*VM*'' -or $_Name -like ''*VM*'' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status, StartType | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object { $_Status -eq ''Stopped'' -and $_StartType -eq ''Automatic'' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'', ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'', ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA"", ""$env:APPDATA"" -Recurse -Depth 2 -Filter ''*cowork*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
